svg.text: THA Portfolio (All 5 Projects) — Annual Debt Service vs. NOI (2024–2034) | Excl. Balloons | 15% Vacancy
Regular annual DS $3,889K/yr · NOI haircut 15% vacancy · ~$33.0M total balloon exposure NOT SHOWN · 2025 DSCR 0.70x → 2034 DSCR 0.91x
Pink band = annual shortfall (NOI < total DS)
⚠ CanyonLands = conduit bond, no audited financials (THA Board memo only)

NOI assumes 15% vacancy rate applied to all projects. Sources: 2023 & 2024 Town of Telluride Audited Financials; THA Board memo June 2024. DS = interest + scheduled principal. Balloons: VooDoo $9.5M (2034), CanyonLands $14.7M (2034), VA Placer $3.9M (2027), Sunnyside $5.5M (2033).
